results.title: MEMS for Mobile Devices Market to Reach USD 15.61 Billion by 2031 as 5G, Wearables and Foldable Displays Accelerate Demand
results.description: Key opportunities include MEMS for 5G/UWB, foldable displays, low-power edge AI, spatial audio, biometric and health wearables, gaming and AR. BAW timing, ultrathin integration, advanced packaging and expansion in emerging mobile markets offer further potential.
